overall.description: A cinematic walk through a gothic palace terrace at sunset, featuring ornate marble gazebos with angel statues, vibrant flower beds, and a panoramic mountain lake view. The footage from a video game (The Witcher 3) follows a character exploring the historic architecture as golden light bathes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace garden with flower beds beside historic building

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone terrace path beside a historic building wall, passing a large tree and colorful flower beds in the golden hour light

entered.detail: mature tree with dense green foliage casting shadows on the path
vibrant red poppies and purple flowers growing along the terrace edge
weathered stone wall of the palace building with architectural details
ornate marble gazebo with tall spires and gothic arches overlooking the terrace
arched stone balustrade with repeating circular cutouts lining the terrace edge
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a historic palace terrace beside a stone building wall, passing a large tree and vibrant flower beds with red poppies. The golden sunset illuminates a distant gothic gazebo and mountain range.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace walkway with gothic balustrade approaching the gazebo

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open terrace walkway toward the ornate gazebo, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in a long purple dress walking along the stone balustrade
man in dark clothing walking alongside the woman toward the camera

entered.detail: golden winged angel statues positioned at the corners of the gazebo structure

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open cobblestone terrace toward the ornate gazebo, passing two pedestrians walking along the arched stone balustrade. The architecture features intricate gothic details and golden angel statues becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of gothic gazebo with marble columns

events.description: camera enters the covered gazebo structure with ornate gothic arches and marble columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior of the gothic gazebo between marble columns and angel statues

entered.detail: polished marble tiles with geometric patterns covering the gazebo floor

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered gazebo structure with tall marble columns and golden angel statues. The lighting shifts to dappled golden hues filtering through the ornate arches as the marble floor replaces the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: central gazebo area with ceremonial brazier

events.description: a seated man becomes visible resting against a gazebo column near the railing

agents.ego_description: approaching the central brazier and a seated figure resting against a gazebo column

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the ground leaning against a marble column, looking out at the mountain view

entered.detail: tall iron fire holder with multiple prongs standing in the center of the gazebo

segments.scene_description: Inside the gazebo interior approaching a central iron brazier, with a seated man visible resting against a column near the railing. The space is defined by elaborate stonework and statues positioned between the columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook with panoramic lake and mountain view

events.description: camera reaches the balustrade edge revealing the expansive lake and mountain panorama

agents.ego_description: moving to the terrace edge to overlook the scenic lake and mountains at sunset

entered.detail: calm lake reflecting the golden sunset with islands visible in the distance
small settlement with red rooftops nestled in the valley below the mountains

segments.scene_description: Moving to the terrace edge past the seated figure, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of a lake, distant mountains, and a village nestled in the valley below, bathed in warm sunset light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush palace terrace into an ornate gothic gazebo, finally opening up to a sweeping mountain vista. It begins by gliding along a stone building wall past vibrant red poppies and a large tree, with the golden sunset illuminating a distant gazebo and mountain range. As the camera moves across the open cobblestone terrace, it passes pedestrians along an arched balustrade before transitioning from the open air into the covered structure. The scene then shifts to a marble interior where dappled golden light filters through tall columns and angel statues, leading the camera past a seated man toward a central iron brazier. Finally, the movement pushes through the gazebo's edge to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of a lake, a valley village, and distant mountains bathed in warm evening light.
